# `!proxmox_lxc`

**Category:** proxmox

Manage a Proxmox LXC container via the API (create/remove). Self-signed certs accepted. Idempotent on state.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_host` | string | yes | Proxmox API host (hostname or IP; port 8006 implied). |
| `api_token_id` | string | yes | Proxmox API token ID. |
| `api_token_secret` | string | yes | Proxmox API token secret. |
| `node` | string | yes | Proxmox node name to place the container on. |
| `vmid` | int | yes | Container VMID. |
| `hostname` | string | no | Container hostname. |
| `ostemplate` | string | no | Template storage path (e.g. local:vztmpl/debian-12.tar.zst). |
| `storage` | string | no | Root-disk storage pool. Default local-lvm. |
| `memory` | int | no | Memory in MB. Default 512. |
| `cores` | int | no | CPU core count. Default 1. |
| `rootfs_size` | string | no | Rootfs size string appended to storage. Default 8G. |
| `net0` | string | no | Raw Proxmox net0 config string. |
| `password` | string | no | Root password. |
| `unprivileged` | bool | no | Unprivileged container. Default true. |
| `start_on_create` | bool | no | Start container immediately after creation. |
| `state` | string | no | present (create if missing, default) or absent (stop + delete). |

## Examples

```yaml
- !proxmox_lxc
  api_host: '{{ proxmox_host }}'
  api_token_id: '{{ proxmox_token_id }}'
  api_token_secret: '{{ proxmox_token_secret }}'
  node: bee
  vmid: 201
  hostname: app01
  ostemplate: local:vztmpl/debian-12-standard.tar.zst
  memory: 2048
  cores: 2
  start_on_create: true
  state: present
```
